title: Rename Item
description: Adds 5918 custom item textures via renamed items.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36a45e7b004c16f64563fbf88a2af1bb9e3a7d1e.png)
![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![About - Rename item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a64ecd24dd3298922f44a81c40bf669aba6433f_0.webp)

Unlock custom item textures by renaming items in-game. This resource pack is built for builders and creative players, allowing you to create detailed decorations, unique item, and immersive builds using simple vanilla mechanics. No mods required just rename item and start building.

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![Feature - Rename item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29c3c1a853fc53fe75715ed4e8f9b09f6432ebac_0.webp)

1. 🎨 Rename-Based Textures
Change an item’s appearance instantly by renaming it in an anvil.

2. 🏗️ Builder-Focused Design
Perfect for creating custom decorations, props, and themed builds.
  
3. 🧩 Vanilla-Friendly
Works entirely in vanilla Minecraft no mods or external tools needed.
  
4. ⚡ Lightweight & Efficient
No performance impact purely texture-based.
  
5. 🧠 Creative Freedom
Turn simple items into detailed assets for storytelling and builds.

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![How it works - Rename Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e622d3643ea6ddbd8f9cd856bd744f8078b5c1b5.png)

1. This pack uses Minecraft’s built-in custom model system.
1. Take a supported item (e.g. stick, paper, etc.)
1. Rename it in an anvil to a specific name.
1. The item will automatically change its texture/model.

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![Demo - Rename Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b197827c468aa76dd36764563bb8a853cdc98682_0.webp)

![rename item demo gif](https://i.postimg.cc/QtpxzRQY/Rename-Item-Demo.gif)
> This pack focuses on visual customization, not gameplay changes!

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![FAQ - rename Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/738afbbd7ae75d37fd1c1bc82159b1b06e8015ee_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Do I need any mods to use this pack?</summary>
No. This resource pack works entirely in vanilla Minecraft. Just install it, rename items in an anvil, and the textures will change automatically.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I activate the custom textures?</summary>
Rename a supported item to the correct name using an anvil. Once renamed, the item will instantly use its custom texture.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Why isn’t my texture changing?</summary>
Common causes: The name is not typed exactly (check spelling, spaces, and capitalization), The item is not supported by the pack, Another resource pack is overriding the same item model.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Does this work in multiplayer?</summary>
Yes, the resource pack works in multiplayer.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Does this pack affect performance?</summary>
No. This is a lightweight resource pack that only changes item models and textures, so it has little to no impact on performance.
</details>

<details>
<summary>What Minecraft versions are supported?</summary>
Works on versions that support custom item models and rename-based overrides. Using the latest version is recommended for best compatibility (>1.21.5).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Is it visible to other players?</summary>
Yes, as long as they have the same resource pack installed and enabled.
</details>

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![Rename List - Item Rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809b6f3c7fb45fa9f7494ee3ff1ab75a160f6640_0.webp)

| ━━━━━━━━━━ Item ━━━━━━━━━━ | ━━━━━━━━━━ Rename ━━━━━━━━━━ |
|------|--------|
| baked_potato | Golden Baked Potato |
| beetroot | Golden Beetroot |
| beetroot_soup | Golden Beetroot Soup |
| bread | Golden Bread |
| chorus_fruit | Golden Chorus Fruit |
| cooked_beef | Golden Steak |

> View the full item list here: [Wiki Page](https://github.com/BibekTheLegend/Rename-Item/wiki)

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![Item Explorer - Rename Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbbed51a5f5461d879d3b17e685fc89a95c808b1.png)

Want to see all available custom items in-game?
Check out the companion tool that lets you browse every supported anvil rename item and resource pack entry directly in-game. [Download RP Rename Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)

![Item Explorer Demo Image - Rename item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c61760a791001c7c7ec1ac00cb59bb6f42d7ca.png)

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33a912d82d16c06e0064059efa4818ae9d4c61f_0.webp)

- Thanks for using this pack! 🎉 
- If you find this resource pack useful, consider give a heart to the project ❤.
- More custom items, improvements, and expansions will be added in future updates. Stay tuned!
